name: 4G LTE Wireless Standard
description: Long-Term Evolution wireless broadband standard using OFDMA

name: Erbium-Doped Fiber Amplifier (EDFA)
description: Optical fiber amplifier enabling long-haul fiber optic telecommunications

name: WiFi (IEEE 802.11)
description: Wireless local area networking using spread spectrum in ISM bands

name: Bluetooth Short-Range Wireless
description: Short-range wireless personal area networking protocol

name: RFID Tags
description: Radio frequency identification tags on flexible substrates for asset tracking (Alien Technology/TI)

name: Fiber Bragg Grating
description: UV-written gratings in optical fiber for wavelength filtering and sensing (United Technologies)

name: MP3 Audio Compression
description: Perceptual audio coding for digital music compression (Fraunhofer IIS)

name: GPS Civilian Precision Receivers
description: High-precision civilian GPS receiver using carrier-phase tracking (Trimble Navigation); enabled precision agriculture, surveying, and navigation after SA disabled 2000

name: RFID EPC Gen2 UHF Standard
description: EPCglobal Gen2 / ISO 18000-6C UHF RFID protocol enabling global supply chain tracking interoperability (Alien Technology/Impinj)

name: 5G Millimeter-Wave NR
description: 5G New Radio millimeter-wave (24-100 GHz) beamforming for multi-gigabit wireless connectivity (Qualcomm)
